items.title: ra-atr
items.text:
Collaborative handwritten text recognition for historical documents from Sweden's National Archives (Riksarkivet).

Live demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/carpelan/lejonet

Layer Technology Frontend Svelte 5, Tailwind CSS 4, ONNX Runtime Web Docs Zensical CI/CD Dagger, Docker, GitHub Actions

items.title: Quick Start
items.text:
make setup   # Install dependencies
make dev     # Start frontend dev server at http://localhost:5173

items.title: Documentation
items.text: • Docs site — architecture, configuration, getting started

items.title: Features
items.text:
• In-browser HTR — ONNX Runtime Web (WASM) with multi-threaded inference
  • GPU acceleration — Optional GPU server for faster inference
  • Export — ALTO XML, PAGE XML, JSON, plain text
  • i18n — Swedish and English

items.title: HTR Pipeline
items.text: Layout Detection (RTMDet) → Line Detection (YOLO) → Transcription (TrOCR)

items.title: Requirements
items.text: • Node.js 22+ — frontend runtime

items.title: License
items.text: Apache 2.0

items.title: Services
items.text: Service Technology Port Purpose Frontend Svelte 5 + ONNX Runtime Web 5173 UI + in-browser inference Backend FastAPI + LanceDB 8000 Catalog search, transcription storage GPU Server FastAPI + Ray Serve + ONNX Runtime 8080 GPU inference (optional) Prometheus prom/prometheus 9090 Metrics collection Grafana grafana/grafana 3000 Dashboards

items.title: HTR Pipeline
items.text:
1. Layout Detection (RTMDet, 97MB)
   Input: page image → Output: text region bounding boxes

2. Line Detection (YOLO, 229MB)
   Input: region crop → Output: line bounding boxes

3. Transcription (TrOCR, 1.5GB)
   Input: line crop → Output: text + confidence

items.title: WASM (Default)
items.text: All models run in-browser via ONNX Runtime Web workers: - worker-layout.ts — RTMDet regions - worker-detect.ts — YOLO lines - worker-transcribe.ts — TrOCR encoder/decoder (pool of 1-8 workers)

items.title: GPU Server (Optional)
items.text: When a GPU server URL is configured (auto-detected at localhost:8080): - Frontend sends image data to GPU server via fetch - Ray Serve handles batching (up to 8 lines per GPU call) - Three deployments share GPU: Layout (0.25), Lines (0.25), Transcription (0.5)

items.title: LanceDB Tables
items.text:
• archive_catalog — 3.7M Riksarkivet volume records with FTS index
  • transcriptions — User transcriptions with per-user isolation

items.title: Image Cache
items.text:
• LRU cache (max 10 images) prevents memory issues with large volumes
  • Images loaded lazily on page navigation
  • Evicted images revert to placeholder state

items.title: Overview
items.text: The frontend is a Svelte 5 SPA using ONNX Runtime Web for in-browser handwritten text recognition.

items.title: Technology Stack
items.text: Technology Purpose Svelte 5 UI framework (runes: $state, $derived, $effect) Tailwind CSS Styling shadcn-svelte UI components ONNX Runtime Web In-browser ML inference (WASM backend) Web Workers Background inference threads

items.title: State Management
items.text:
• frontend/src/lib/stores/app-state.svelte.ts — Centralized app state with auto-save and LRU cache
  • frontend/src/lib/worker-state.svelte.ts — HTR worker orchestration and GPU routing

items.title: Workers
items.text:
• frontend/src/worker-layout.ts — RTMDet layout detection
  • frontend/src/worker-detect.ts — YOLO line detection
  • frontend/src/worker-transcribe.ts — TrOCR transcription (pooled, 1-8 workers)

items.title: Components
items.text:
• frontend/src/lib/components/TranscriptionPanel.svelte — Right panel (workspace tree)
  • frontend/src/lib/components/CatalogPanel.svelte — Left panel (archive search)
  • frontend/src/routes/viewer/+page.svelte — Main workspace page

items.title: Inference Pipeline
items.text:
Image → Layout Detection (RTMDet) → Line Detection (YOLO) → Transcription (TrOCR) → Text

Runs either in-browser (WASM workers) or on a remote GPU server, auto-detected at localhost:8080.

items.title: Contributing
items.text: See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.

items.title: Development Workflow
items.text:
make check   # Format + lint + typecheck
make test    # Run all tests
make serve   # Start dev servers

items.title: Commit Messages
items.text:
We use Conventional Commits:

  • feat: — New feature
  • fix: — Bug fix
  • docs: — Documentation
  • refactor: — Code restructure
  • test: — Tests
  • chore: — Maintenance
  • perf: — Performance
  • ci: — CI/CD

items.title: Pre-commit Hooks
items.text:
Install hooks: 

pre-commit install
pre-commit install --hook-type commit-msg

Hooks run automatically on commit: - Ruff format + lint - Trailing whitespace cleanup - Conventional commit message validation

items.title: Prerequisites
items.text: • Node.js 22+

items.title: Setup
items.text:
git clone https://github.com/AI-Riksarkivet/ra-atr.git
cd ra-atr

# Install dependencies
make setup

# Start development server
make dev

Open http://localhost:5173

items.title: GPU Inference Server
items.text:
For faster inference using a GPU, see lejonet-inference.

The frontend auto-detects the GPU server at localhost:8080.

items.title: Search Backend
items.text:
For archive catalog search and transcription storage, see lejonet-search.

# Run frontend without backend
VITE_DISABLE_BACKEND=true make dev

items.title: Make Targets
items.text: Target Description make setup Install all dependencies make dev Start frontend dev server make build Production build make deploy Build and deploy to HF Space make quality Run prettier + svelte-check make test Run tests make docs-dev Serve documentation locally

items.title: Environment Variables
items.text: Variable Default Description VITE_MODEL_BASE /models Base URL for ONNX model files VITE_GPU_SERVER (auto-detect) GPU inference server URL VITE_DISABLE_BACKEND false Disable backend features (catalog search)

items.title: Model Configuration
items.text:
Models are loaded from the VITE_MODEL_BASE URL. For local development, place .onnx files in frontend/public/models/.

For production (HuggingFace Space), models are loaded from: 

https://huggingface.co/carpelan/htr-onnx-models/resolve/main

items.title: Model Files
items.text: Model File Size Purpose RTMDet rtmdet.onnx 97 MB Layout detection YOLO yolo.onnx 229 MB Line detection TrOCR trocr_encoder.onnx + trocr_decoder.onnx 1.5 GB Transcription

items.title: GPU Server
items.text:
The frontend auto-detects a GPU server at localhost:8080. To use a remote GPU server:

VITE_GPU_SERVER=https://my-gpu-server.example.com make dev

See lejonet-inference for GPU server setup.

items.title: Search Backend
items.text:
The catalog search feature requires the search backend running at localhost:8000.

VITE_DISABLE_BACKEND=true make dev  # Run without backend

See lejonet-search for backend setup.
